name: concurrent-cl-gate rejects a candidate that overlaps an active CL on commit branch per §2.23 (e) per-branch concurrency clause
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s1","phases":["E"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > sessions/s1.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s2","phases":["F"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json --allow-concurrent 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'reject reason=overlap_e' out.txt && grep -q 'branch=feat/x' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
